title: SPORTSPET Mini Bounce Dog Balls - Premium Rubber Dog Balls for Puppy Dogs Standard Pack of 4 (45mm)
features: Indestructible Bounce: Tailored for smaller pets, our 45mm Mini Bounce dog balls deliver an unbeatable bounce, thanks to the unique dimple design. Perfect for captivating play with your small dogs and cats.
Compact and Safe for Little Ones: Each mini ball is crafted without harmful paraffins and PAHs, ensuring a safe, non-toxic play experience for your petite companions.
Tough Yet Gentle: Made from a superior blend of natural and Japanese rubbers, these balls offer durability that's just right for the softer jaws of smaller pets.
Eye-Catching and Easy to Find: Brightly colored for high visibility, these small rubber balls are ideal for keeping track of during both land and water play, perfect for your little adventurer.
Safety: SPORTSPET values your dog's safety. Our products are durable, not indestructible. Use under supervision and discontinue if damaged. Always select an appropriate ball size for your pet.
description: Product Description 45mm in diameter, the ball is suitable for small dog breeds, cats and kittens. Know your companion and make sure to understand their jaw size and bite to select suitable size. Always supervise. Premium long-lasting natural rubber & thick core for great durability, along with compressed air for that extra bounce. Easy to clean surface and comes in a range of vivid colours At 45mm the mini Bounce isn't compatible with a launcher.
